description_long: This is a robust, rectangular blue storage box with a smooth, hard exterior and subtle geometric detailing on its surfaces. The box features a recessed handle on one side, designed for easy lifting and carrying, and a flat, removable lid that fits securely on top. The sides of the box are adorned with shallow indented patterns and small circular details, likely for structural reinforcement and aesthetic appeal. The lid appears to have a slightly raised section with additional geometric markings, possibly for stacking stability. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily from molded plastic, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. Its size and design make it ideal for storing tools, equipment, or miscellaneous items in garages, workshops, or utility spaces.
description: A sturdy blue plastic storage box with a recessed handle, removable flat lid, and geometric surface detailing, suitable for urban storage needs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed handle and the main access side of the box.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric indented patterns and circular reinforcements, with no visible handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but with a different handle design, possibly for identification or secondary access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with geometric indents and circular details, mirroring view 1.
